prompt: Create a high-energy square anime illustration of Becky, a cute blonde cowgirl, taking an extreme close-up selfie with Bourbon, a goofy gray donkey. The girl is on the left foreground with huge expressive blue eyes, one eye winking, flushed cheeks, a panicked funny open mouth with her tongue sticking out, sweat drops, and messy curly golden-blonde hair spilling from under an oversized brown leather cowboy hat with stitched edges and silver conchos. She wears a brown leather western jacket, red paisley bandana, cream lace-trimmed top, denim shorts, belt with a western buckle, and cowgirl details. The donkey is on the right, pushing into frame with tall ears, wild eyebrows, big mismatched-looking surprised eyes, a broad toothy grin, and its mouth biting or tugging on the fringe of the girl's leather jacket, making the pose chaotic and comedic. Use a fisheye wide-angle perspective, exaggerated chibi-anime facial expressions, glossy cel shading, highly detailed hair and leather textures, dynamic cropped composition, vibrant colors, and a psychedelic swirling background of neon pink, teal, orange, purple, and blue spiral patterns. Make it playful, loud, cute, and absurd, like a polished modern Japanese anime key visual; no text, no watermark.
